violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some walkin cooler shelves noted not in good repair. Lower metal shelf in kitchen area noted rusting needs repair or replacement.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): A few light covers in back kitchen area noted not in good repair not cleanable need replacement. .
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener not properly maintained needs routine cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some wire-type shelving inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair rusting.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): A few ceiling tiles in mens restroom noted wet-stained need replaced. ( also- repair any water leaks above these tiles)
